description: Agricultural Land vs Food Production Data with Population and Undernourishment (2000-2020)

indicators.agriculturalLand: Agricultural land (% of land area) - AG.LND.AGRI.ZS
indicators.agriculturalLandArea: Agricultural land area (10,000 sq km) - Calculated from AG.LND.AGRI.ZS * AG.LND.TOTL.K2
indicators.foodProductionPerCapita: Food production index per capita - Calculated
indicators.undernourishment: Prevalence of undernourishment (% of population) - SN.ITK.DEFC.ZS
